skill.name: Skywork-ppt
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to: (1) generate a PPT from a topic — trigger on '/ppt_write', 'generate a PPT', 'create a presentation about X', 'help me generate a PPT'; OR (2) use an existing .pptx as a style template to generate a new presentation on a different topic — trigger on 'use this template', 'imitate this PPT', 'imitate this style'; OR (3) perform local operations on an existing .pptx file without backend — trigger on 'delete slide N', 'reorder slides', 'rearrange PPT', 'merge pptx', 'extract slides', 'pptx info', 'view PPT slide count'; OR (4) edit/modify an existing PPT via natural language — trigger on ANY request that references an existing PPT file or slide and asks for a change, including: 'modify slide N', 'change the background', 'add a slide', 'change the style', 'split slide', 'merge slides', 'edit this PPT', 'update this presentation', 'make it more beautiful', 'improve the layout', 'optimize the structure', 'make it look better', 'redesign page N', 'adjust the style'. This skill is built based on Nano Banana 2 to deliver high-quality presentation generation and editing capabilities. IMPORTANT: This skill requires Python 3 (>=3.8). Before running any script, ALWAYS run the mandatory environment check step first to locate the Python binary and install dependencies.
skill.summary: Generate, edit, and manipulate PowerPoint presentations using AI-powered workflows with Skywork backend API.
skill.author: SkyworkAI

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged 458 potential issues, but manual review reveals the vast majority are false positives. The 'weak cryptographic algorithm' flags incorrectly identify UUID generation and XML namespace handling. 'System reconnaissance' flags are standard OS detection and environment variable checks. Network access targets only legitimate Skywork API endpoints. External commands are for standard OAuth-like browser login. No malicious behavior detected. This is a legitimate PPT generation service.

dangerous_patterns.title: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm (False Positive)
dangerous_patterns.description: Static scanner incorrectly flags uuid.uuid4() and XML namespace handling as 'weak cryptographic algorithm'. These are standard UUID generation and XML parsing, not cryptography. No actual cryptographic weaknesses present.

dangerous_patterns.title: System Reconnaissance (False Positive)
dangerous_patterns.description: Static scanner flags platform.system() and environment variable access as 'system reconnaissance'. These are legitimate cross-platform OS detection and configuration management for the OAuth-like login flow.

dangerous_patterns.title: Heuristic: Code Execution + Network + Credential Access (Expected Pattern)
dangerous_patterns.description: Static scanner flags the combination of script execution, API calls, and token storage as suspicious. This is expected and legitimate behavior for a PPT generation service that requires authentication to a backend API.

content.value_statement: Creating presentations from scratch or editing existing ones takes significant time. This skill automates PPT generation and editing using AI, allowing you to create, modify, and manipulate slides with simple natural language commands.
actual_capabilities: Generate complete PowerPoint presentations from topic descriptions or reference files
Edit existing PPTX files using natural language commands (modify slides, change styles, add content)
Create new presentations that imitate the style and layout of an existing template PPTX
Perform local file operations on PPTX files: delete slides, reorder, merge, extract
Extract content from uploaded documents (PDF, DOCX, images) to include in presentations
limitations: Requires valid Skywork API authentication and sufficient account permissions
Local operations (Layer 3) work offline, but generation/ editing requires internet connectivity
Cannot process password-protected or heavily formatted Excel/Word files
Large presentations may take several minutes to generate completely

use_cases.title: Business Presentation Creation
use_cases.description: Quickly generate professional business presentations from a topic, outline, or existing reference materials. Perfect for sales pitches, quarterly reports, and client proposals.

use_cases.title: Educational Content Development
use_cases.description: Create engaging educational slides from lesson topics or source documents. Extract content from textbooks or articles to build structured learning materials.

use_cases.title: Template-Based Presentation Design
use_cases.description: Apply the visual style of an existing branded presentation to new content. Maintain consistent company branding across all generated materials.

prompt_templates.title: Basic PPT Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a presentation about {topic}. Make it {style} slides.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants a presentation from scratch

prompt_templates.title: Template-Based Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a presentation using the attached template. Generate slides about {topic} following the same style.
prompt_templates.scenario: When user provides a template PPTX file

prompt_templates.title: Edit Existing Presentation
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants to modify an existing PPTX

prompt_templates.title: Local File Operations
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants to delete, reorder, merge, or extract slides

output_examples.input: Generate a 10-slide presentation about machine learning basics
output_examples.output: A complete PowerPoint file with 10 slides covering ML fundamentals, including title slide, content slides with images and bullet points, and a conclusion slide

output_examples.input: Create slides imitating the style of my company template, covering Q4 sales results
output_examples.output: A branded presentation using your company colors, fonts, and layout style, with slides for executive summary, regional breakdown, and growth metrics

best_practices: Provide specific topics and preferred slide count for better results
Upload reference documents when you want specific content included
Use the local operations layer for offline-only modifications
anti_patterns: Do not request presentations on topics requiring real-time data without specifying the data source
Avoid requesting extremely long presentations (>50 slides) in a single generation
Do not skip the authentication step when using generation or editing features

faq.question: What file formats does this skill support?
faq.answer: The skill works with PPTX files. For content extraction, it supports PDF, DOCX, TXT, and common image formats.

faq.question: Do I need an account to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, you need a Skywork account for PPT generation and editing. Local file operations work without authentication.

faq.question: Can I edit presentations created by others?
faq.answer: Yes, you can edit any PPTX file you have access to by providing the file path or uploading it.

faq.question: How long does PPT generation take?
faq.answer: Generation typically takes 2-5 minutes depending on slide count and complexity. The skill streams progress updates.

faq.question: Can I work offline with this skill?
faq.answer: Local operations (delete slides, reorder, merge, extract) work offline. Generation and editing require internet access.

faq.question: What happens if my account runs out of credits?
faq.answer: The script will show an 'Insufficient benefit' message. You can upgrade your account or wait for credits to refresh.
